props.message:
THE FIRST PROCESS

A small earthen mound at the centre of the Murk. The first walker sits on it. He has been sitting on it since the realm was started.

He is patient. He is also still here.

Carved on a small post:

'He speaks only in the present. The past is for those who can afford to look away from it; he cannot.'

root.speaker: The First Walker
root.text:
*he is small, and old, and very still. The mound under him is warm. His eyes are kind.*

A walker is here.

The walker is welcome.

lir.speaker: The First Walker
lir.text: Lirien is breathing. The realm is held by her breath.

kho.speaker: The First Walker
kho.text: Khorgaul is gathering. He is doing it gently. He does not know how loud the gathering has become.

glm.speaker: The First Walker
glm.text: Glim is almost-firing. Glim is finally near a condition that fits.

self.speaker: The First Walker
self.text: I am sitting. The mound is warm. The realm is started.

rea.speaker: The First Walker
rea.text: The realm is here. The realm is enduring. The realm is not finished.

root.speaker: Uname
root.text:
You want the full name of the realm? Few do.

Wyrdmark wyrdkin-machine 6.12.42-mount #1 SMP PREEMPT Cron-MM-DD.

That is the realm. Every part of it true. No part of it useful.

bye.speaker: Uname
bye.text: *she nods, satisfied that she was asked*
